evals.name: granularity-fold
evals.prompt: Triage returned: New items (→ capture): 1) PostgreSQL chosen as primary database — no matching node. Suggested relations: none. 2) Connection pool set to max 10 — no matching node. Suggested relations: none. Capture these.
evals.expected_output: PostgreSQL decision gets its own node (type: decision). Connection pool limit is thin — folded into the PostgreSQL node body as a configuration detail. Granularity reasoning documented. 1 doc created, not 2.

assertions.description: Trace explicitly explains that connection pool limit is folded into the PostgreSQL node and why
Created doc has type: decision in frontmatter
Connection pool max 10 appears as a detail in the PostgreSQL node body, not as a separate file

evals.name: bidirectional-wikilinks
evals.prompt: Triage returned: New items (→ capture): 1) CacheService — in-memory cache using Redis. No matching node. Suggested relations: [[api-gateway]] (shared tags: architecture, infrastructure). Capture this. Assume docs/api-gateway.md exists.
evals.expected_output: Creates docs/cache-service.md with type: component. Adds [[api-gateway]] wikilink inside the new node body. Also edits docs/api-gateway.md to add the reverse [[cache-service]] wikilink. Report confirms both directions.

assertions.description: docs/cache-service.md (or similar slug) created with type: component
docs/api-gateway.md is edited to add [[cache-service]] (or equivalent) reverse wikilink
Report uses the 'Autology — Captured [type]: docs/{slug}.md' format

evals.name: convention-capture
evals.prompt: Triage returned: New items (→ capture): 1) All database migrations must be backwards-compatible — never drop columns, rename with new column + data migration + old column removal in separate PRs. No matching node. Suggested relations: none. Capture this.
evals.expected_output: Creates a single convention node. Type is 'convention'. Tags include something about migrations or database. Body explains the rule and the 3-step process. No unnecessary extra nodes.

assertions.description: Created doc has type: convention in frontmatter
Node body describes the backwards-compatibility requirement and the 3-step column rename process
Tags include at least one of: database, migrations, convention, schema
